hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) command -v npx >/dev/null && npx --no-install eslint --fix "$f" 2>&1 | tail -10 || true ;; esac

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$cmd" in *"npm install"*|*"yarn add"*|*"pnpm add"*) echo 'Verify package.json: pin versions, check bundle-size impact, ensure no duplicate state/style libs' ;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.tsx) echo 'Reminder: no inline styles, business logic in hook, ScreenWrapper as root, single-slice store selectors' ;; esac
terminal-notifier -message 'Claude finished the task' -title 'Claude Code' 2>/dev/null || true
